settings.auto-start-breaks-desc: Automatically start break timer after work session
settings.auto-start-work-desc: Automatically start work timer after break
settings.compact-mode-desc: A shorter and more minimal look for the widget
settings.long-break-duration-desc: Duration of long breaks in minutes
settings.sessions-before-long-break-desc: Number of work sessions before a long break
settings.short-break-duration-desc: Duration of short breaks in minutes
settings.work-duration-desc: Duration of each work session in minutes
settings.hooks-enabled-desc: Execute shell commands on timer events
settings.hook-timer-pause-desc: Runs when timer is paused. $1 = current mode
settings.hook-session-finish-desc: Runs when a session completes. $1 = finished mode
settings.hook-mode-change-desc: Runs when switching modes. $1 = new mode

toast.long-break-finished: Long break over! Ready for a new cycle?
toast.title: Pomodoro
toast.work-finished: Work session complete! Time for a break.
